name: Bug report
description: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps or minimal code to reproduce:

```javascript
import { init } from "accel-gpu";

const gpu = await init();
// Your code here
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- accel-gpu version: (e.g. 0.2.5)
- Browser (if applicable): (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17)
- Node version (if applicable): (e.g. 20.x)
- Backend used: (WebGPU / WebGL2 / CPU)

## Additional context

Any other relevant info, screenshots, or error messages.
